name: Endless Apocalypse
short_description: Endless Apocalypse is an exhilarating shooter game that immerses you in an infinite adventure across diverse levels. Encounter a captivating array of enemies and formidable bosses, challenging your reflexes and strategic thinking for triumphant victories.
detailed_description:
Experience the exhilaration of Endless Apocalypse, an action-packed shooter game that propels you on an infinite adventure across diverse levels. Engage in thrilling encounters with a distinctive array of enemies and formidable bosses, testing your reflexes and strategic prowess for victory. Immerse yourself in the captivating gameplay enhanced by classic graphics and immersive 3D maps. Stay engaged with the dynamic weapon system and ever-changing levels that ensure a fresh and challenging experience. Seamlessly navigate the game with an intuitive and visually stunning user interface, effortlessly selecting your arsenal and unleashing devastation upon waves of enemies.

SWAP AND COLLECT WEAPONS

Explore each level and discover a wide variety of weapons to collect and swap. With unique weapons available in every level, you'll never get bored of using the same guns.

DESTROY THE ENEMIES/BOSSES

Journey through challenging levels and face off against powerful enemies and bosses determined to stop you from progressing. Be cautious, as some enemies are formidable enough to pose a real threat.

NEW MAPS IN EACH LEVEL/SECRET EASTER EGGS

Prepare to be captivated by the stunning and intricately designed maps in every level. As you ascend to higher levels, the complexity and length of your escape increase. Uncover hidden secrets and encrypted words as you explore each map.

OBJECTIVE AND RADAR

Our radar system helps you stay vigilant and monitor enemy presence effortlessly. The objective in the game serves as the primary goal or mission for players to achieve. It provides a clear purpose and direction, propelling gameplay and creating a sense of advancement.

LEADERBOARD/ACHIVEMENTS

Compete against other players time on each level, and track your progress on the leaderboard. Your time will be automatically submitted!
Earn achievements as you conquer challenges and showcase your skills.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, German, Simplified Chinese, French, Portuguese - Portugal, Japanese, Russian
